steps.title: Combine inside the parentheses
steps.content:
First combine the like terms inside the parentheses:
$$5w+4w=9w$$

steps.title: Check the expression form
steps.content: The expression subtracts all of $5w+4w$, so the amount subtracted is $9w$. That leaves $15w$, not $12w$, $23w$, or $25w$ as the result.

steps.title: Select the matching choice
steps.content: The equivalent expression is $15w$. The answer is B.
